headline: Boston Dynamics first agent baseline. Established-band placement strongly reinforced: (1) Atlas production-ready 2026 with full-year capacity committed to Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America (RMAC, Savannah, Georgia) — initial deployments target processes with proven safety and quality benefits like parts sequencing; (2) ASTM humanoid safety standards working group LEADER alongside Agility and Figure; (3) 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory and ORIGINAL convener of the pledge — terms and conditions of sale explicitly prohibit weaponization or harm/intimidation use; (4) CES 2026 'Best Robot' award for Atlas; (5) Google DeepMind partnership integrating cognitive foundation models. Hyundai ownership provides additional governance scaffolding (Hyundai publicly committed to upholding Boston Dynamics ethical policies including anti-weaponization). NOTE: SPOT demo entity (rank 48, composite 20.3) is structurally separate in the index — captures border/security demonstration deployments and is NOT being reassessed today. Published 65.6 / Established band sustained. Half-step up signals across multiple dimensions but composite drift sub-threshold (cluster-pattern math). Recommend confirm at 65.6 with first-baseline rationale.
key_evidence: Atlas industrial humanoid production-ready 2026; full 2026 production capacity committed to Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America (RMAC, Savannah, Georgia) and Google DeepMind — structured industrial deployment focus on safety/quality processes (parts sequencing).
Boston Dynamics 2022 anti-weaponization pledge: signatory and original convener; terms and conditions of sale explicitly prohibit weaponization, harm, or intimidation use of products.
ASTM humanoid safety standards working group leader alongside Agility and Figure AI; May 27-28 2026 Boston convening upcoming.
CES 2026 'Best Robot' award for Atlas (Hyundai/CNET Group recognition).
Google DeepMind partnership: foundation-model integration into Atlas — cognitive-AI accountability framework propagation from DeepMind.
Hyundai parent-entity public commitment to upholding Boston Dynamics ethical policies including anti-weaponization pledge.
Long-standing 'An Ethical Approach to Mobile Robots in Our Communities' published framework.

evidence.finding: Atlas industrial-humanoid evolution from research platform; structured deployment-readiness narrative.

evidence.source: Boston Dynamics — General Purpose Robots Should Not Be Weaponized
evidence.finding: Original 2022 anti-weaponization pledge convening document; explicit policy framework.

evidence.source: IMechE — Boston Dynamics reveals commercial Atlas humanoid for Hyundai factories
evidence.finding: Commercial Atlas deployment to Hyundai Metaplant America Savannah Georgia by 2028; initial focus on parts sequencing for safety/quality.

evidence.source: Hyundai Motor Group — CES 2026 Best Robot Award
evidence.finding: Atlas named 'Best Robot' in Best of CES 2026 Awards by CNET Group.

evidence.source: Boston Dynamics — Ethical Approach to Mobile Robots
evidence.finding: Published ethics framework predates 2022 anti-weaponization pledge; sustained ethical posture.

evidence.source: The Robot Report — ASTM humanoid safety standards working group
evidence.finding: Boston Dynamics co-leading ASTM humanoid safety standards working group with Agility and Figure.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 4.0 confirmed. A1 detection: SPOT operational reporting + structured Atlas deployment readiness; A4 amplification: ASTM standards-working-group leadership amplifies cross-vendor safety signals.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 4.0 confirmed. E1 affective resonance: 'Ethical Approach to Mobile Robots' framework explicitly addresses human-coexistence concerns; sustained empathic-regard architecture.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 3.5 confirmed. AC2 proportionality: structured Hyundai deployment focused on safety/quality processes (parts sequencing); AC4 response: long-standing incident-response and software-update infrastructure.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.0 confirmed. EQ2 distributional awareness: humanoid-deployment scale concentrates capability among well-resourced industrial partners; consumer-equity not yet a deployment dimension.
scoring_rationale.BND: 3.5 confirmed. B3 scope clarity: 2022 anti-weaponization pledge active; terms-of-sale prohibition explicit; B5 consent: factory-deployment context consistent with declared use cases. SPOT demo entity captures separate border/security deployments.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 3.5 confirmed. AB2 transparency: published ethics framework, public ASTM-working-group participation, CES recognition; AB4 reparation: software-update infrastructure provides remediation capability.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 3.5 confirmed. S1 causal reasoning: ASTM safety-standards leadership operationalizes systemic-harm reasoning at industry level; Hyundai parent-entity governance scaffolding adds structural-accountability layer.
scoring_rationale.INT: 4.0 confirmed. I1 consistency: 2022 anti-weaponization pledge maintained through 2026 commercial deployment; declared ethical commitments consistent with operational pattern; Google DeepMind partnership extends INT framework via foundation-model accountability.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction confirms 65.6. Established band sustained. Confirm with first-baseline rationale; sub-threshold positive drift documented.

negativeSignals: SPOT demo border/security deployments captured by separate index entry — sustained negative signal at SPOT-demo entity level (composite 20.3); no published independent third-party safety audit beyond ASTM standards work; humanoid commercial deployment pre-dates regulatory framework (EU Machinery Regulation 2027, OSHA-humanoid 2027).
positiveSignals: Atlas production-ready 2026 with structured Hyundai deployment focus on safety/quality processes; 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory and original convener; ASTM humanoid safety standards leader; CES 2026 Best Robot award; Google DeepMind cognitive-AI partnership; Hyundai parent-entity public commitment to ethical policies; long-standing 'Ethical Approach to Mobile Robots' framework; terms-of-sale weaponization prohibition.
sector_context: Robotics Labs / industrial-humanoid cluster. Cross-reference: Agility (anti-weaponization pledge co-signatory, Toyota pilot), Apptronik (multi-pilot deployment), Figure AI (no pledge, BMW pilot), Hyundai/Kia parent. Boston Dynamics distinguished by original convening of anti-weaponization pledge + ASTM leadership + structured Hyundai industrial deployment + CES recognition + DeepMind cognitive partnership. Highest-credibility entity in commercial-humanoid cluster.
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with established-band confirmation
Atlas production-readiness and Hyundai deployment context absorbed
Anti-weaponization pledge (2022 original convener) status registered

Watch: 2027 EU Machinery Regulation and OSHA-humanoid guidance compliance posture
Watch: any humanoid-deployment harm or incident report
Watch: SPOT demo entity (separate index entry) developments — sustained negative signal there
